title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The gods and the great Shiraoki have done it! Oh,
and you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With this many plushies, you and I will never run
dry of good luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please take some too, Trainer! Then we'll have
twice the luck! No, even better, we'll have our
luck raised to the second power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, with our super-duper-ultra-mega-great
blessing, no one can stand against us!
